note: Retainer slots typically fill 2-3 months ahead. Early commitment secures your calendar slot.

tiers.description: Part-time hands-on engineering for smaller teams and early-stage projects. Perfect for adding infrastructure capacity without hiring full-time. Ideal for CI/CD setup, containerization, or initial cloud platform design.

Reliable hands-on engineering every week with consistent capacity and same-day response times. Shift priorities week-to-week based on what matters most. Ideal for ongoing optimization, feature development, infrastructure scaling, technical debt reduction, or keeping cloud infrastructure lean and efficient.
features: Flexible scope — shift priorities week to week

tiers.description: Deep partnership with dedicated engineering capacity for complex, ongoing technical leadership. Best for teams scaling infrastructure, running critical compliance programs, or building new cloud platforms. Includes architecture review, mentoring, and hands-on implementation.
